en_title: New Nintendo Switch 2 Announced for Europe This Fall: Will Be Slightly Heavier, But With User-Replaceable Batteries
cn_title: 任天堂今秋将在欧洲推出新版Switch 2
subtitle: 可更换电池
opus_summary: 任天堂将在欧洲推出新版Switch 2硬件和配件，以应对欧盟即将生效的电池法规。新版主机和部分手柄将支持用户自行更换电池，但重量会略有增加。

paragraphs.en: Nintendo's new Switch 2 model for Europe will roll out this fall, with user-replaceable batteries that make the console slightly heavier.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂面向欧洲的新款Switch 2将于今年秋季推出，它配备用户可自行更换的电池，因此主机会略微变重。

paragraphs.en: As previously reported by Japanese newspaper Nikkei, Nintendo will soon make changes to its Switch 2 hardware and various accessories in advance of fresh European Union legislation that requires users to be able to replace batteries in electrical equipment.
paragraphs.cn: 正如日本《日经新闻》此前报道，任天堂很快会调整Switch 2硬件和多款配件，以提前应对欧盟新法规。该法规要求电子设备中的电池必须能够由用户更换。

paragraphs.en: The idea is that equipment can be serviced more easily, and will last longer without requiring users to repurchase a whole new controller, for example, or send it back to Nintendo for a fix. Switch 1 Joy-Con will receive a new model first, starting from this summer, with no change to battery capacity and weight.
paragraphs.cn: 这一规定的思路是让设备更容易维修，并延长使用寿命，例如不必让用户重新购买一整个新手柄，或把设备寄回任天堂维修。从今年夏季开始，Switch 1的Joy-Con将率先推出新版，但电池容量和重量不会变化。

paragraphs.en: But Switch 2 models sold from this fall onwards will have a slightly smaller (by 1%) new replaceable battery in the console and attached Joy-Con 2 controllers. This will see the console's weight increase from 534 grams to 548 grams with controllers attached (or from 401g to 411g without controllers attached.
paragraphs.cn: 但从今年秋季开始销售的Switch 2机型，将在主机和随附Joy-Con 2手柄中使用略小1%的新版可更换电池。装上手柄后，主机重量会从534克增加到548克；不装手柄时，则从401克增加到411克。

paragraphs.en: Switch 2 Joy-Con sold individually from this winter onwards will also have replaceable batteries, as will new Nintendo Switch 2 Pro Controllers (which will see their battery size shrink by 16%, though end up 7g lighter).
paragraphs.cn: 从今年冬季开始单独销售的Switch 2 Joy-Con也将配备可更换电池，新款Nintendo Switch 2 Pro手柄同样如此；后者电池尺寸会缩小16%，但最终会轻7克。

paragraphs.en: Lastly, retro console controllers available from early 2027 onwards will also be altered, with the Switch's N64 controller 1g heavier, and the Switch 2's GameCube controller 5g heavier.
paragraphs.cn: 最后，从2027年初开始供应的复古主机手柄也会调整，其中Switch的N64手柄会重1克，Switch 2的GameCube手柄会重5克。

paragraphs.en: Intriguingly, Nintendo has decided not to release a new version of the Switch 1 in Europe 鈥?and will instead simply withdraw the aging hardware from sale within the region.
paragraphs.cn: 有意思的是，任天堂决定不在欧洲推出新版Switch 1，而是直接在该地区停止销售这款老旧硬件。

paragraphs.en: Battery replacement kits for each product will be available to purchase from Nintendo Store in Europe in the future, the company said in a blog post .
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂在博客文章中表示，未来每款产品的电池更换套件都将在欧洲Nintendo Store上架销售。

paragraphs.en: "Starting summer 2026, in preparation for upcoming changes in European battery regulations coming into effect in mid-February 2027, selected Nintendo products in Europe will begin to be replaced on a rolling basis by revisions that contain a user-replaceable battery," Nintendo said. "There is no difference in functionality between current products and revised products containing user-replaceable batteries.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂表示：「从2026年夏季开始，为准备将于2027年2月中旬生效的欧洲电池法规变化，欧洲部分Nintendo产品将开始逐步替换为内含用户可更换电池的修订版本。现有产品与包含用户可更换电池的修订产品在功能上没有区别。」

paragraphs.en: "The first revised products are expected to become available from summer 2026, with additional products becoming available in autumn, winter, and early 2027. Due to a variety of factors, revised products may not become available in all European countries simultaneously."
paragraphs.cn: 「首批修订产品预计将从2026年夏季开始供应，更多产品将在秋季、冬季和2027年初陆续推出。由于多种因素，修订产品可能不会在所有欧洲国家同时上市。」

paragraphs.en: Nintendo already sells a specific Japanese language-only version of Switch 2 in its homeland, which is priced cheaper in comparison to the console's cost overseas. However, while the console is region-locked to only play Japanese games and access the Japanese version of the eShop, there console is otherwise identical in terms of its form factor.
paragraphs.cn: 任天堂已经在日本本土销售一款仅支持日语的Switch 2特定版本，其价格相比海外版更低。不过，虽然这款主机有区域锁定，只能游玩日版游戏并访问日版eShop，但在外形规格上与其他版本相同。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系Tom，或在Bluesky上找到他。
